**If this is a vulnerability that could be exploited, do not open this issue.** Email security@zlar.ai or use [GitHub private vulnerability reporting](https://github.com/ZLAR-AI/ZLAR/security/advisories/new).

## Security concern

Describe the concern. This template is for non-critical security improvements (hardening suggestions, documentation gaps, defense-in-depth ideas).

## Impact

What could go wrong if this is not addressed?

## Suggested mitigation

How would you address this?
